quote.msg: 第11題點解(3)唔得?

replies.msg:
有三條式 fulfill , 可以好公式化鳩計
Final speed of x = a, final speed of y = b

1) Conservation of momentum
(1/2)(m)(4) + (1/2)(2m)(0) = (1/2)(m)(a) + (1/2)(2m)(b)

2) Initial KE >= final KE (= if elastic, > if inelastic)
(1/2)(m)(4)^2 + (1/2)(2m)(0)^2 >= (1/2)(m)(a)^2 + (1/2)(2m)(b)^2

3) One ball does not overtake another
b >= a
